sections.author: Let Us All Rejoice
sections.snippet: Be my protector, O God, a mighty stronghold to save me. For you are my rock, my stronghold! Lead me, guide me, for the sake of your name.

sections.author: Spirit & Psalm 2025
sections.snippet: Blessed are they who hope in the Lord.

sections.author: Spirit & Psalm 2025
sections.snippet: Rejoice and be glad; your reward will be great in heaven

sections.title: Hold On to Love
sections.author: Jesse Manibusan
sections.snippet: There is a place for the sadness. Hold on to Love. There is a season of gladness. Hold on to Love. When pain and confusion seem endless, hold on to Love. We cultivate healing through kindness. Hold on to Love.

sections.author: Let Us All Rejoice
sections.snippet: God so loved the world that he gave his Only Begotten Son, so that all who believe in him may not perish, but may have eternal life.

sections.title: God of Mercy
sections.author: Ricky Manalo CSP/Bob Hurd
sections.snippet: God of mercy, holy myst’ry, ever faithful one, you have pitched your tent among us, reconciling love. Heart and mind of Christ, live within our lives, form us into people of mercy and grace.

sections.title: God So Loved
sections.author: Ken Canedo
sections.snippet: God so loved the world. God so loved the world he gave his only Son, his only Son and, to those who believe in him: you shall not fear death, for you shall have eternal life.  Yes, you shall have eternal life. God so loved the world.

sections.title: Go Make a Difference
sections.author: Steve Angrisano / Tom Tomaszek
sections.snippet: Go make a diff'rence. We can make a diff'rence. Go make a diff'rence in the world. Go make a diff'rence. We can make a diff'rence. Go make a diff'rence in the world.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Lord have mercy! Christ have mercy! Lord have mercy!

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Glory to God! Glory to God in the highest, and on earth, peace to people of goodwill.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Holy, holy, holy Lord God of hosts. Heaven and earth are full of your glory. Hosanna in the highest. Blessed is he who comes in the moment of the Lord. Hosanna in the highest.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: When we eat this breadand drink this cup, we proclaim your death, O Lord, until you come again.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world. Grant us, grant us peace.
